eColorCMYK - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORSPACE
Four channels cyan, magenta, yellow, black.
eColorCMYK_Konly - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORSPACE
Four channels CMYK where only K is used.
eColorCMYKA - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORSPACE
Five channels CMYK including alpha.
eColorGray - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORSPACE
One channel gray.
eColorGrayA - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORSPACE
Two channels gray and alpha.
eColorLAB - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORSPACE
Three channels CIE LAB.
eColorOther - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORSPACE
Not one of the above.
eColorPalette - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORSPACE
One channel palette indices (into an RGB color table).
eColorRGB - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORSPACE
Three channels red, green, blue.
eColorRGBA - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORSPACE
Four channels red, green, blue, alpha.
eColorYCbCr - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORSPACE
Three channels Luminance (Y) and Chroma (Cb, Cr)
eColorYCbCrK - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORSPACE
Four channels Luminance (Y), Chroma (Cb, Cr) and black.
eComprAttemptFlate - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSIONATTEMPT
Lossless flate (ZIP) compression.
eComprAttemptGroup3 - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSIONATTEMPT
Lossless CCITT Fax Group3 compression.
eComprAttemptGroup3_2D - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSIONATTEMPT
Lossless CCITT Fax Group3 (2D) compression.
eComprAttemptGroup4 - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSIONATTEMPT
Lossless CCITT Fax Group4 compression.
eComprAttemptJBIG2 - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSIONATTEMPT
Lossless JBGI2 compression.
eComprAttemptJPEG - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSIONATTEMPT
Lossy DCT (Discrete Cosine Transform, JPEG) compression.
eComprAttemptJPEG2000 - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSIONATTEMPT
Lossy JPEG2000 compression.
eComprAttemptLZW - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSIONATTEMPT
Lossless LZW (Lempel-Ziff-Welch) compression.
eComprAttemptMRC - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSIONATTEMPT
Mixed Raster Content (MRC) optimization.
eComprAttemptNone - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSIONATTEMPT
Exclude from processing.
eComprAttemptRaw - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSIONATTEMPT
No compression (raw).
eComprAttemptSource - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSIONATTEMPT
Use same compression as source image
eComprDefault - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSION
 
eComprFlate - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSION
Lossless flate (ZIP) compression.
eComprGroup3 - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSION
Lossless CCITT Fax Group3 compression.
eComprGroup3_2D - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSION
Lossless CCITT Fax Group3 (2D) compression.
eComprGroup4 - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSION
Lossless CCITT Fax Group4 compression.
eComprJBIG2 - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSION
Lossless JBGI2 compression.
eComprJPEG - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSION
Lossy DCT (Discrete Cosine Transform, JPEG) compression.
eComprJPEG2000 - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSION
Lossy JPEG2000 compression.
eComprLZW - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSION
Lossless LZW (Lempel-Ziff-Welch) compression.
eComprRaw - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSION
No compression (raw).
eComprTIFFJPEG - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSION
Lossy TIFF embedded JPEG (6) compression
eComprUnknown - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPRESSION
 
eConfAction - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains actions types other than for navigation (launch, JavaScript, ResetForm, etc.)
eConfAlternate - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains alternate information (images).
eConfAnnot - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains unknown annotation types.
eConfAppearance - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains annotations or form fields with ambiguous or without appropriate appearances.
eConfColor - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains device-specific color spaces.
eConfEncrypt - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The file is encrypted and the password was not provided.
eConfExternal - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains references to external content (reference XObjects, file attachments, OPI).
eConfFont - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains fonts without embedded font programs or encoding information (CMAPs)
eConfFormat - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The file format (header, trailer, objects, xref, streams) is corrupted.
eConfMetaData - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document's meta data is either missing or inconsistent or corrupt.
eConfMultimedia - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains multimedia annotations (sound, movies).
eConfOptional - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains optional content (layers).
eConfPDF - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document doesn't conform to the PDF reference (missing required entries, wrong value types, etc.).
eConfPostScript - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains embedded PostScript code.
eConfPrint - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains hidden, invisible, non-viewable or non-printable annotations.
eConfRendering - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains illegal rendering hints (unknown intents, interpolation, transfer and halftone functions).
eConfStructure - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document doesn't provide appropriate logical structure information.
eConfTransp - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains transparency.
eConfUnicode - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCONFORMANCECATEGORY
The document contains fonts without appropriate character to Unicode mapping information (ToUnicode maps)
eConvCMYK - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORCONVERSION
Color conversion to the CMYK color space (Printing).
eConvGray - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORCONVERSION
Color conversion to the Gray color space (B/W TV compatible).
eConvNone - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORCONVERSION
No conversion.
eConvRGB - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COLORCONVERSION
Color conversion to the ICE sRGB color space (Web).
eDestModeFit - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFDESTMODE
"Fit" The view is such that the whole page is visible.
eDestModeFitB - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFDESTMODE
"FitB" The view is such that the page's bounding box is visible.
eDestModeFitBH - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFDESTMODE
"FitBH" top The view is top-aligned with top and shows the whole width of the page's bounding box.
eDestModeFitBV - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFDESTMODE
"FitBV" left The view is left-aligned with left and shows the whole height of the page's bounding box.
eDestModeFitH - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFDESTMODE
"FitH" top The view is top-aligned with top and shows the whole page width.
eDestModeFitR - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFDESTMODE
"FitR" left, bottom, right, top The view contains the rectangle specified the two coordinates (left, bottom) and (right, bottom).
eDestModeFitV - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFDESTMODE
"FitV" left The view is left-aligned with left and shows the whole page height.
eDestModeXYZ - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFDESTMODE
"XYZ" left, top, zoom The upper left corner of the view is positioned at the coordinate (left, top) with the given zoom factor.
eDitherAtkinson - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.DITHERINGMODE
 
eDitherFloydSteinberg - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.DITHERINGMODE
 
eDitherG3Optimized - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.DITHERINGMODE
 
eDitherG4Optimized - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.DITHERINGMODE
 
eDitherHalftone - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.DITHERINGMODE
 
eDitherNone - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.DITHERINGMODE
 
eDitherPattern - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.DITHERINGMODE
 
eFontCFF - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.FONTTYPE
PostScript Compact Font Format (CFF) font program.
eFontTrueType - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.FONTTYPE
TrueType font program.
eFontType1 - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.FONTTYPE
PostScript Type1 font program.
eFontType3 - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.FONTTYPE
PDF font program.
eModeAccurate - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDERINGMODE
The accurate mode uses the Windows GDI+ for rendering.
eModeDirect - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDERINGMODE
This mode is deprecated.
eModeFast - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDERINGMODE
The fast mode uses the Windows GDI for rendering.
eOptimizationProfileDefault - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.OPTIMIZATIONPROFILE
Minimal optimization
eOptimizationProfileMax - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.OPTIMIZATIONPROFILE
Optimize file size as much as possible
eOptimizationProfileMRC - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.OPTIMIZATIONPROFILE
Make MRC optimization
eOptimizationProfilePrint - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.OPTIMIZATIONPROFILE
Optimize for printing
eOptimizationProfileWeb - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.OPTIMIZATIONPROFILE
Optimize for the web
eOptionAutoAccurateMode - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Automatically switch to accurate mode if necessary, e.g. to render transparent content.
eOptionBanding - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Use banding to split bitmaps into 64k pieces.
eOptionBicubic - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Use bicubic interpolation mode.
eOptionBilinear - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Use bilinear interpolation mode.
eOptionBitmap - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Send a pre-rendered bitmap to the physical device.
eOptionDisableAnnots - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Disable the drawing of annotations (including Popups)
eOptionDisableBPC - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Disable black point compensation (BPC)
eOptionDisableBuffer - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Disable transparency backbuffer.
eOptionDisableContent - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Disable the drawing of the page content and draw annotations only
eOptionDisableFilter - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Disable image filtering.
eOptionDisablePatterns - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Disable patterns; use light gray instead.
eOptionDisablePS - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Disable PostScript injection.
eOptionDoNotPrintSig - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Do not print digital signature appearances.
eOptionDrawPopups - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Draw popup annotations.
eOptionEnableOverprint - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Enable the blending of overprinted colorants
eOptionFillStrokes - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Convert line strokes to a filled path
eOptionFitPaths - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION2
Fit clipping paths to pixel grid.
eOptionHighQuality - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Use high quality rendering.
eOptionJPEG - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Convert bitmaps to the JPEG format if supported.
eOptionNoAntialiasing - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION2
Don't anti-aliasing in rasterization.
eOptionNoBackground - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Don't paint white background.
eOptionNoBPC - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION2
Don't use black point compensation (BPC).
eOptionNoEmbedded - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Don't use embedded fonts.
eOptionNoHinting - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION2
Don't use hinting for glyph rendering.
eOptionNoInterpolation - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION2
Don't use interplation filtering for images.
eOptionNoLowPassFilter - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION2
Don't use low-pass filtering for images.
eOptionOpenType - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Convert Type1 to OpenType fonts.
eOptionOutlines - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Convert CFF and Type1 fonts to graphics outlines (GDI+ only).
eOptionPNG - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Convert bitmaps to the PNG format if supported.
eOptionPreInstalled - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Use pre-installed fonts wherever possible.
eOptionPrint - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Simulate printing
eOptionPrintingMode - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION2
Render in printing mode.
eOptionPrintOnlySig - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Print the signature appearance only (without any status appearances).
eOptionPSLevel2 - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Use PostScript language level 2 (printing only, default is 3).
eOptionTransparency - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Deprecated.
eOptionTrueType - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Convert CFF and Type1 fonts to TrueType.
eOptionType1 - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Convert simple OpenType to Type1 fonts.
eOptionUseBoxFilter - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION2
Use a box filter instead of a Gauss filter.
eOptionUseFastImages - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Use fast mode image rendering even in accurate mode.
eOptionUseUnicodes - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Use Unicodes instead of GlyphIds.
eOptionWindows9x - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.RENDEREROPTION
Use Windows 9x compatible printer driver interface.
eOrientationBottomLeft - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ORIENTATION
 
eOrientationBottomRight - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ORIENTATION
 
eOrientationLeftBottom - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ORIENTATION
 
eOrientationLeftTop - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ORIENTATION
 
eOrientationRightBottom - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ORIENTATION
 
eOrientationRightTop - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ORIENTATION
 
eOrientationTopLeft - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ORIENTATION
 
eOrientationTopRight - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ORIENTATION
 
eOrientationUndef - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ORIENTATION
 
ePageLayoutOneColumn - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFPAGELAYOUT
Display the pages in one column.
ePageLayoutSinglePage - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFPAGELAYOUT
Display one page at a time.
ePageLayoutTwoColumnLeft - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFPAGELAYOUT
Display the pages in two columns, with odd-numbered pages on the left.
ePageLayoutTwoColumnRight - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFPAGELAYOUT
Display the pages in two columns, with odd-numbered pages on the right.
ePageLayoutTwoPageLeft - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFPAGELAYOUT
(PDF 1.5) Display the pages two at a time, with odd-numbered pages on the left.
ePageLayoutTwoPageRight - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFPAGELAYOUT
(PDF 1.5) Display the pages two at a time, with odd-numbered pages on the right.
ePageModeFullScreen - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFPAGEMODE
Full-screen mode, with no menu bar, window controls, or any other window visible.
ePageModeUseAttachments - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFPAGEMODE
(PDF 1.6) Attachments panel visible.
ePageModeUseNone - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFPAGEMODE
Neither document outline nor thumbnail images visible.
ePageModeUseOC - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFPAGEMODE
(PDF 1.5) Optional content group panel visible.
ePageModeUseOutlines - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFPAGEMODE
Document outline visible.
ePageModeUseThumbs - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFPAGEMODE
Thumbnail images visible.

ePDFA1b - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPLIANCE
 
ePDFA2a - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPLIANCE
 
ePDFA2b - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPLIANCE
 
ePDFA2u - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPLIANCE
 
ePDFA3a - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPLIANCE
 
ePDFA3b - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPLIANCE
 
ePDFA3u - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPLIANCE
 
ePDFConversionErrorActionRemoved - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.CONVERSIONERROR
Remove interactive elements such as actions or annotations.
ePDFConversionErrorColorants - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.CONVERSIONERROR
Resolve name collisions of colorants (PDF/A-2 and PDF/A-3 only).
ePDFConversionErrorCorrupt - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.CONVERSIONERROR
The input document is corrupt.
ePDFConversionErrorDocSigned - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.CONVERSIONERROR
Conversion of signed document forced removal of signatures.
ePDFConversionErrorEFRemoved - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.CONVERSIONERROR
Remove embedded files.
ePDFConversionErrorFontSubst - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.CONVERSIONERROR
Font substituted.
ePDFConversionErrorNone - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.CONVERSIONERROR
None.
ePDFConversionErrorOCGRemoved - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.CONVERSIONERROR
Remove optional content groups (layers) (PDF/A-1 only).
ePDFConversionErrorTranspRemoved - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.CONVERSIONERROR
Remove transparency (PDF/A-1 only).
ePDFConversionErrorVisualDiff - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.CONVERSIONERROR
Visual differences in output file.
ePDFConversionErrorXMPRemoved - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.CONVERSIONERROR
Remove non convertible XMP metadata.
ePdfCopyAnnotations - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCOPYOPTION
Copy interactive annotations such as sticky notes or highlight annotations.
ePdfCopyAssociatedFiles - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCOPYOPTION
Copy associated files.
ePdfCopyFormFields - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCOPYOPTION
Copy interactive form fields.
ePdfCopyLinks - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCOPYOPTION
Copy links (document internal and external links).
ePdfCopyLogicalStructure - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCOPYOPTION
Copy logical structure and tagging information.
ePdfCopyNamedDestinations - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCOPYOPTION
Copy named destinations.
ePdfCopyOutlines - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCOPYOPTION
Copy outlines (also called bookmarks).
ePdfFlattenAnnotations - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCOPYOPTION
Flatten annotations preserves the visual appearance of annotations, but discards all interactive elements.
ePdfFlattenFormFields - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCOPYOPTION
Flatten form fields preserves the visual appearance of form fields, but discards all interactive elements.
ePdfFlattenSignatures - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCOPYOPTION
Flatten the visual appearance of signed signature fields.
ePdfMergeOCGs - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCOPYOPTION
Merge compatible optional content groups (layers).
ePdfOptimizeResources - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCOPYOPTION
Find and merge redundant resources such as fonts and images.
ePdfSeparateAcroForms - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PDFCOPYOPTION
Keep AcroForm fields from different files separate even if they are identical.
ePDFUnk - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.COMPLIANCE
 
ePermAll - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PERMISSION
Grant all permissions.
ePermAnnotate - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PERMISSION
Allow annotations.
ePermAssemble - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PERMISSION
Allow document assembly.
ePermCopy - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PERMISSION
Allow content copying or extraction.
ePermDigitalPrint - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PERMISSION
Allow high resolution printing.
ePermFillForms - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PERMISSION
Allow filling of form fields.
ePermModify - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PERMISSION
Allow changing the document.
ePermNoEncryption - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PERMISSION
Do not apply encryption.
ePermNone - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PERMISSION
 
ePermPrint - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PERMISSION
Allow low resolution printing.
ePermSupportDisabilities - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.PERMISSION
Allow support for disabilities.
eRotateAttribute - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ROTATEMODE
Set the rotation to the viewing rotation attribute of the PDF page, i.e. rendering the page with the same rotation as it is displayed in a PDF Viewer.
eRotateLandscape - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ROTATEMODE
Rotate page to landscape.
eRotateNone - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ROTATEMODE
Do not rotate the page; do not consider the viewing rotation attribute of the PDF page.
eRotatePortrait - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ROTATEMODE
Rotate page to portrait.
eStripAll - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.STRIPTYPE
Strip (and flatten) all of the above.
eStripAlternates - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.STRIPTYPE
Alternate image dictionaries.
eStripAnnots - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.STRIPTYPE
Strip and flatten all annotations except form fields and links.
eStripForms - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.STRIPTYPE
Strip and flatten form fields.
eStripFormsAnnots - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.STRIPTYPE
Strip and flatten all annotations including form fields.
eStripLinks - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.STRIPTYPE
Strip and flatten link annotations.
eStripMetadata - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.STRIPTYPE
Metadata dictionaries.
eStripOutputIntents - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.STRIPTYPE
Output intents.
eStripPieceInfo - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.STRIPTYPE
PieceInfo dictionaries.
eStripSpider - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.STRIPTYPE
Spider dictionaries.
eStripStructTree - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.STRIPTYPE
StructTree dictionaries.
eStripThreads - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.STRIPTYPE
Thread, Bead dictionaries.
eStripThumb - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.STRIPTYPE
Thumb dictionaries.
eTECBreakGraphicsState - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.TEXTEXTCONFIGURATION
Start new text object, if graphics state changes (color).
eTECBreakSpaceUnicode - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.TEXTEXTCONFIGURATION
Start new text object, if extracted text contains a space Unicode.
eTECBreakTextState - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.TEXTEXTCONFIGURATION
Start new text object, if text state changes (font, font size, horiz scaling).
eTECPosMergeMultiSpace - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.TEXTEXTCONFIGURATION
Merge text tokens that are one or more space widths apart, insert multiple spaces.
eTECPosMergeSingleSpace - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.TEXTEXTCONFIGURATION
Merge text tokens that are a single space width apart, insert space.

F

G

getBitonalCompression() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Deprecated in Version 4.6. Use PdfOptimize.getBitonalCompressions() instead.
getBitonalCompressions() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the compression types for bi-tonal (black and white) images.
getBitonalResolutionDPI() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the target resolution in dots per inch (DPI) after re-sampling images for bi-tonal images.
getBitonalThresholdDPI() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the threshold resolution in dots per inch (DPI) for bi-tonal images.
getClipImages() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get whether invisible parts of images are clipped (cropped).
getColorCompression() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Deprecated in Version 4.6. Use PdfOptimize.getContinuousCompressions() instead.
getColorConversion() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the color conversion to use on color images, see NativeLibrary.COLORCONVERSION.
getColorResolutionDPI() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the target resolution in dots per inch (DPI) after re-sampling images for color images.
getColorThresholdDPI() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the threshold resolution in dots per inch (DPI) for color images.
getCompressionQuality() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Use PdfOptimize.getImageQuality() instead.
getContinuousCompressions() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the compression types to be tried for continuous images, i.e.
getConvertToCFF() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get whether embedded Type1 (PostScript) fonts shall be converted to Type1C (Compact Font Format).
getDitheringMode() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get whether dithering is enabled or disabled when down-sampling bi-tonal images.
getErrorCode() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the latest error code.
getExtractFonts() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the switch to extract the embedded fonts.
getExtractImages() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get whether images are extracted.
getFlattenSignatureFields() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get whether appearances of signature fields are flattened.
getForceCompressionTypes() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get whether image re-compression is forced if an image in the input PDF has a compression type that differs from the compression types given in PdfOptimize.setContinuousCompressions(int), PdfOptimize.setBitonalCompressions(int), or PdfOptimize.setIndexedCompressions(int).
getForceRecompression() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get whether images are always re-compressed using the specified image compression and other image parameters.
getImageQuality() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the quality index of the lossy compression.
getImageStratConserv() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Deprecated in Version 4.7. Get the switch for the conservative image processing strategy: Only try re-compressing an image if it has either been clipped ( PdfOptimize.setClipImages(boolean)), re-sampled ( PdfOptimize.setResolutionDPI(float), PdfOptimize.setThresholdDPI(float)), or if it has undergone a color conversion (PdfOptimize.setColorConversion(int)), or if PdfOptimize.setForceRecompression(boolean) is enabled. Otherwise the original input image is taken as is.
getIndexedCompressions() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the compression types for images that have an indexed ("palette") color space.
getLicenseIsValid() - Static method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Check if a valid license is loaded.
getLinearize() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get whether the PDF output file will be linearized, i.e. optimized for fast web access.
getMergeEmbeddedFonts() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the switch to merge embedded font programs.
getMonochromeCompression() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Deprecated in Version 4.6. Use PdfOptimize.getContinuousCompressions() instead.
getMonochromeResolutionDPI() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the target resolution in dots per inch (DPI) after re-sampling images for monochrome images.
getMonochromeThresholdDPI() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the threshold resolution in dots per inch (DPI) for monochrome images.
getMrcLayerCompression() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the compression type for MRC foreground and background layers.
getMrcLayerQuality() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the image quality for MRC foreground and background layers when using a lossy compression type.
getMrcLayerResolutionDPI() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the target resolution in DPI for down-sampling MRC foreground and background layers.
getMrcMaskCompression() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the compression type for MRC masks.
getMrcPictCompression() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the compression type for MRC cut-out pictures.
getMrcRecognizePictures() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the option to recognize areas of photographic pictures when doing MRC.
getOptimizeResources() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get whether resources shall be optimized.
getPageCount() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the number of total pages of the input document.
getPdf() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the PDF output file previously stored in memory.
getProductVersion() - Static method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the version of the product
getReduceColorComplexity() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get whether the color complexity of images is reduced.
getRemoveNonSymbolicFonts() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Deprecated in Version 4.7.
getRemoveReduntantObjects() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get whether redundant objects shall be removed.
getRemoveStandardFonts() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get whether the font programs of all embedded standard fonts shall be removed, such as Arial, Courier, CourierNew, Helvetica, Symbol, Times, TimesNewRoman and ZapfDingbats.
getResolutionDPI() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the target resolution in dots per inch (DPI) after re-sampling images. getResolutionDPI returns the target resolution in DPI for color images.
getStrip() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the stripping mode: This mode can be configured to remove unneeded data of a PDF document such as Threads, Metadata, the PieceInfo, the StructTreeRoot entry, embedded Thumbs and the SpiderInfo entry.
getSubsetFonts() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get whether embedded fonts are subset and embedded font programs of different subsets of the same font merged.
getThresholdDPI() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Get the threshold resolution in DPI above which images are re-sampled.

J

JPEG_E_JERR_BAD_ALIGN_TYPE - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE

JPEG_E_JERR_BAD_LIB_VERSION - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1979449331: Error in DCT stream: Wrong JPEG library version: library is %d, caller expects %d.
JPEG_E_JERR_BAD_MCU_SIZE - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE

JPEG_E_JERR_BAD_SAMPLING - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE

L

LIC_E_EXPIRED - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531830: The license has expired.
LIC_E_FORMAT - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531836: Invalid license format.
LIC_E_LEVEL - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531828: The current license does not permit the use of this function.
LIC_E_MANIP - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531835: License was manipulated.
LIC_E_MEXPIRED - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531829: The maintainance period has expired.
LIC_E_NOTFOUND - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531837: License not found.
LIC_E_NOTINIT - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531839: License management is not initialized.
LIC_E_NOTSET - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531838: No license set.
LIC_E_PLATFORM - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531832: The license does not match the current platform.
LIC_E_PRODUCT - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531833: The license does not match the product.
LIC_E_STORE_NAME - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531582: Could not determine product name from key.
LIC_E_STORE_TYPE - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531583: Incorrect type in license store.
LIC_E_TYPE - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531831: The license type does not match.
LIC_E_VERSION - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1978531834: Unsupported license format version.
linearizeFile(String, String, String, String, String, int) - Static method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Linearize a PDF file and save the result as a new PDF file, which is optimized for fast web view.
listFonts(String) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
List all fonts included in the document and write them as a list to a text file.
listImages(String) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
List all images included in the document and write them as a list to a text file.

N

NativeLibrary - Class in com.pdftools
The NativeLibrary class provides the basic enums for the functions in the java package.

O

open(String, String) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Open a PDF file, i.e. make the objects contained in the document accessible.
openMem(byte[], String) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Open an input PDF memory block, i.e. make the objects contained in the document accessible.

PdfOptimize - Class in com.pdftools.pola
The purpose of the PDF Image Optimization API is to adjust embedded raster images in a PDF to the specific needs, such as reducing the resolution for fast viewing via the web, or converting colors for printing.
PdfOptimize() - Constructor for class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Simple Constructor
PdfOptimize(String, String) - Constructor for class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Deprecated in Version 4.7. Use PdfOptimize.PdfOptimize() and PdfOptimize.open(String, String) instead.
PdfOptimize(byte[], String) - Constructor for class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Deprecated in Version 4.7. Use PdfOptimize.PdfOptimize() and PdfOptimize.openMem(byte[], String) instead.

R

RDF_E_ATTRLI - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
-1979121662: rdf:li is not allowed as attribute, only as element.

RDF_W_MULTID - Static variable in class com.pdftools.NativeLibrary.ERRORCODE
168394759: RDF resources should have only one identifier (rdf:resource, rdf:nodeID, rdf:about, rdf:ID, ...).
renameFont(String, String) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated.  

S

saveAs(String, String, String, int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Create an output PDF document and store the optimized input file.
saveInMemory() - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Save the output PDF in memory.
setBitonalCompression(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Deprecated in Version 4.6. Use PdfOptimize.setBitonalCompressions(int) instead.
setBitonalCompressions(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the compression types for bi-tonal (black and white) images.
setBitonalResolutionDPI(float) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the target resolution in dots per inch (DPI) after re-sampling images for bi-tonal images.
setBitonalThresholdDPI(float) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the threshold resolution in dots per inch (DPI) to selectively activate re-sampling for bi-tonal images.
setClipImages(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Clip invisible parts of images.
setCMSEngine(String) - Static method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the name of the Color Management System (CMS) engine (None, Neugebauer, lcms or a filename).
setColorCompression(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Deprecated in Version 4.6. Use PdfOptimize.setContinuousCompressions(int) instead.
setColorConversion(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the color conversion to use on color images.
setColorResolutionDPI(float) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the target resolution in dots per inch (DPI) after re-sampling images for color images.
setColorThresholdDPI(float) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the threshold resolution in dots per inch (DPI) to selectively activate re-sampling for color images.
setCompressionQuality(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Use PdfOptimize.setImageQuality(int) instead.
setContinuousCompressions(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the compression types to be tried for continuous images, i.e.
setConvertToCFF(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the switch to convert embedded Type1 (PostScript) fonts to Type1C (Compact Font Format).
setDitheringMode(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Enable or disable dithering when down-sampling bi-tonal images.
setExtractFonts(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the switch to extract the embedded fonts.
setExtractImages(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Images can be extracted to individual image files during processing of the PDF file.
setFlattenSignatureFields(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
A signature in a PDF consist of two parts: The invisible digital signature in the PDF The visual appearance that was attributed to the signature Part 1 can be used by a viewing application, to verify that a document has not changed since it has been signed and report this to the user.
setForceCompressionTypes(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the switch to force re-compression of images if an image in the input PDF has a compression type that differs from the compression types given in PdfOptimize.setContinuousCompressions(int), PdfOptimize.setBitonalCompressions(int), or PdfOptimize.setIndexedCompressions(int).
setForceRecompression(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the switch to always re-compress images using the specified image compression and other image parameters.
setImageQuality(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the quality index of the lossy compression.
setImageStratConserv(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Deprecated in Version 4.7. Set the switch for the conservative image processing strategy: Only try re-compressing an image if it has either been clipped ( PdfOptimize.setClipImages(boolean)), re-sampled ( PdfOptimize.setResolutionDPI(float), PdfOptimize.setThresholdDPI(float)), or if it has undergone a color conversion ( PdfOptimize.setColorConversion(int)), or if PdfOptimize.setForceRecompression(boolean) is enabled. Otherwise the original input image is taken as is.
setIndexedCompressions(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the compression types for images that have an indexed ("palette") color space.
setInfoEntry(String, String) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the value of an info entry key.
setLicenseKey(String) - Static method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the license key.
setLinearize(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set whether to linearize the PDF output file, i.e. optimize file for fast web access.
setMergeEmbeddedFonts(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the switch to merge embedded font programs.
setMonochromeCompression(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Deprecated in Version 4.6. Use PdfOptimize.setContinuousCompressions(int) instead.
setMonochromeResolutionDPI(float) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the target resolution in dots per inch (DPI) after re-sampling images for monochrome images.
setMonochromeThresholdDPI(float) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the threshold resolution in dots per inch (DPI) to selectively activate re-sampling for monochrome images.
setMrcLayerCompression(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the compression type for MRC foreground and background layers.
setMrcLayerQuality(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the image quality for MRC foreground and background layers when using a lossy compression type.
setMrcLayerResolutionDPI(float) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the target resolution in DPI for down-sampling MRC foreground and background layers.
setMrcMaskCompression(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the compression type for MRC masks.
setMrcPictCompression(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the compression type for MRC cut-out pictures.
setMrcRecognizePictures(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the option to recognize areas of photographic pictures when doing MRC.
setOptimizeResources(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set whether resources should be optimized.
setProfile(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the optimization profile.
setReduceColorComplexity(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Convert images to their least complex color space.
setRemoveNonSymbolicFonts(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Deprecated. Deprecated in Version 4.7.
setRemoveRedundantObjects(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set whether redundant objects should be removed.
setRemoveStandardFonts(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set whether to remove the font programs of all embedded standard fonts, such as Arial, Courier, CourierNew, Helvetica, Symbol, Times, TimesNewRoman and ZapfDingbats.
setResolutionDPI(float) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the target resolution in dots per inch (DPI) after re-sampling images.
setStrip(int) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the stripping mode: This mode can be configured to remove unneeded data of a PDF document such as Threads, Metadata, the PieceInfo, the StructTreeRoot entry, embedded Thumbs and the SpiderInfo entry.
setSubsetFonts(boolean) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Subset embedded fonts and merge embedded font programs of different subsets of the same font, granted they can be merged.
setThresholdDPI(float) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the threshold in DPI to selectively activate re-sampling.
setVersion(String) - Method in class com.pdftools.pola.PdfOptimize
Set the minimum PDF version of the created PDF output file.
